name: Pineapple-Bran Whole-Wheat Muffins
recipeIngredient: 8 oz Can crushed pineapple with juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the flour, baking powder, salt, and brown sugar in a large bowl.
2. In another bowl, beat the egg slightly.
3. Add the cereal, milk, and vegetable oil to the beaten egg. Stir until well combined.
4. Allow the mixture to stand for 2 minutes or until the cereal has softened.
5. Stir in the crushed pineapple with its juice.
6. Gently fold the flour mixture into the cereal mixture until just combined.
7. Spoon the batter evenly into a paper-lined muffin tin.
8. Bake at 400°F (200°C) for about 25 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
9. Serve warm.
